item.title: 多家车企辟谣「锁电被约谈」传言
item.guid: 多家车企辟谣「锁电被约谈」传言
item.description:
Regarding the rumors circulating online that "8 car companies were interviewed and 3 were put under investigation," BYD, Xpeng Motors, and GAC Aion successively issued statements yesterday, explicitly denying the information. Nio, Tesla, Zeekr, Leapmotor, Li Auto, and other car companies also told China Newsweek that they had not received any interviews. 针对网络流传的「8 家车企被约谈、3 家被立案调查」传言，比亚迪、小鹏汽车、广汽埃安昨日相继发布声明，明确否认上述信息。蔚来、特斯拉、极氪、零跑、理想等车企也均向中新经纬表示，未收到约谈。

    BYD's official Weibo stated that the relevant rumors are "purely false rumors," and the company has collected evidence and will pursue legal responsibility against the rumor-mongers according to law;

    Xpeng Group's legal department's official Weibo pointed out that, upon verification, the company has not received such interviews recently, nor is it under investigation;

    AITO Wenjie Auto issued a statement calling this false information and pure fabrication;

    GAC Aion's legal department's official Weibo stated that the online rumors about being interviewed and included in the investigation list due to OTA "battery lock" issues are "purely fabricated";

    Tesla stated that the news was false information and that all software updates have been rigorously tested and filed;

    Zeekr stated that it is preparing a debunking announcement.

According to CCTV News, the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers issued a statement yesterday, stating that recent online rumors such as "8 new energy vehicle companies were interviewed due to battery locking issues" and "3 car companies were put on file for investigation" are false information, and the online content has no official source and is seriously inconsistent with the facts. 另据央视新闻报道，中国汽车工业协会昨日发声明称，近期网络流传的「8 家新能源车企因锁电问题被约谈」「3 家车企被立案」等说法为不实信息，网传内容无官方来源，与事实严重不符。

The association's relevant spokesperson emphasized that all industry regulatory dynamics and enforcement measures are subject to official information from the competent authorities. 协会相关负责人强调，一切行业监管动态与执法举措，均以主管部门官方正式信息为准。

item.title: 李想回应理想 L9 四年换代：汽车不是手机，安全验证无法提速
item.guid: 李想回应理想-L9-四年换代：汽车不是手机，安全验证无法提速
item.description:
Li Xiang, CEO of Li Auto, publicly responded on Weibo yesterday to external doubts about the new Li Auto L9's four-year replacement cycle. 理想汽车 CEO 李想昨日在微博公开回应外界对全新理想 L9 换代周期长达四年的质疑。

The Li Auto L9 was first launched in June 2022, and by May this year, its replacement cycle is nearly four years, significantly longer than the iteration pace of consumer electronics. Li Xiang explained that there is a fundamental difference between automobiles and consumer electronic products like mobile phones. 理想 L9 于 2022 年 6 月首次上市，至今年 5 月换代周期接近四年，明显长于消费电子产品的迭代节奏。李想对此解释称，汽车与手机等消费电子产品存在本质区别。

Cars truly cannot achieve the same replacement speed as mobile phones; they concern the life safety of a family, and a large amount of verification work requires long periods of repeated testing and refinement.

Li Xiang also mentioned that although AI technology is currently developing rapidly, in the specific professional field of automotive testing and verification, the improvement in actual vehicle verification efficiency is still quite limited. 李想同时提到，尽管 AI 技术目前发展迅猛，但在汽车测试与验证这一具体专业领域，对实车验证效率的提升仍然相当有限。

item.title: SK 海力士回应员工人均奖金 610 万元
item.guid: SK-海力士回应员工人均奖金-610-万元
item.description:
According to reports from Yicai and Cailian Press, SK Hynix responded yesterday to previous predictions that the average bonus for its Korean employees would reach 6.1 million RMB, stating that since this year's and next year's annual performance have not yet been determined, the bonus scale cannot be predicted either. 据第一财经、财联社报道，海力士昨日针对此前韩国员工人均奖金将达 610 万人民币的预测回应称，由于今年与明年的年度业绩尚未确定，奖金规模亦无法预测。

The company also stated that it has established a new system at the headquarters level, using 10% of operating profit as a funding source to distribute performance bonuses once a year. 该公司同时表示，已在总部层面建立了一套新制度，以营业利润的 10% 作为资金来源，每年发放一次绩效奖金。

As the competition in AI semiconductors intensifies across the board, talent has become a core competitive factor. To this end, the company is committed to attracting outstanding talent with competitive compensation and benefits to maintain its long-term competitive advantage.

International investment bank Macquarie Securities previously predicted that if SK Hynix's operating profit reaches 447 trillion Korean Won next year, based on 10% of operating profit and a simple calculation using the total number of approximately 35,000 employees at the end of last year, the total dividend scale would reach approximately 44.7 trillion Korean Won, with an average bonus of approximately 1.29 billion Korean Won per person, close to 6.1 million RMB. 国际投行麦格理证券此前预测，若海力士明年营业利润达到 447 万亿韩元，按营业利润的 10% 与去年年末约 3.5 万名员工总数简单测算，分红总规模将达约 44.7 万亿韩元，人均可发放奖金约 12.9 亿韩元，接近 610 万人民币。

item.title: 曝苹果正在研发全息屏幕 iPhone
item.guid: 曝苹果正在研发全息屏幕-iPhone
item.description:
According to MacRumors, citing supply chain sources, Apple is developing a "spatial iPhone" equipped with a holographic display. According to tech leaker "Schrödinger," Samsung is currently developing a holographic smartphone display codenamed "MH1" or "H1." 据 MacRumors 援引供应链消息报道，苹果正研发一款配备全息显示屏的「空间 iPhone」。据科技爆料人「Schrödinger」透露，三星目前正在研发代号为「MH1」或「H1」的全息智能手机显示屏。

This screen differs from early naked-eye 3D technology by adopting a solution that directly integrates a nanostructured holographic layer into the AMOLED stack, combined with eye-tracking and diffractive beam steering technology, to redirect light at precise angles to the user's eyes. 该屏幕与早期裸眼 3D 技术有所不同，采用在 AMOLED 堆叠中直接集成纳米结构全息层的方案，并结合眼球追踪与衍射光束转向技术，将光线以精准角度重定向至用户眼部。

With the accompanying patented algorithm, users do not need to wear special glasses; they only need to tilt the device to achieve 360-degree viewing around objects, creating a spatial depth illusion that appears to float above the screen. 通过配套的专利算法，用户无需佩戴特殊眼镜，仅需倾斜设备即可实现 360 度绕物查看，产生悬浮于屏幕上方的空间深度错觉。

Regarding display performance, the leak claims that the H1 display can maintain native 4K resolution when handling regular 2D tasks, with the holographic depth layer only activating for adapted content, thereby achieving "zero clarity loss" and avoiding the image quality degradation issues of traditional lenticular 3D screens. 在显示性能方面，爆料称 H1 显示屏在处理常规 2D 任务时可维持原生 4K 分辨率，全息深度层仅在适配内容下激活，以此实现「零清晰度损耗」，规避传统透镜式 3D 屏幕的画质折损问题。

Currently, the project is still in its first phase of research and development, and the full commercialization of holographic smartphones is expected around 2030. 目前，该项目仍处于研发第一阶段，全息智能手机的全面商用时间节点预计在 2030 年左右。

item.title: MiniMax 回应大模型不认识马嘉祺
item.guid: MiniMax-回应大模型不认识马嘉祺
item.description:
MiniMax yesterday published a technical blog, disclosing the root cause of the M2 series large model "not recognizing Ma Jiaqi" and announcing that the fix has been completed. It is worth noting that the model can still accurately answer questions related to Ma Jiaqi; what it lost was merely the ability to "write out this character." MiniMax 昨日发布技术博客，披露 M2 系列大模型「不认识马嘉祺」的根因，并宣布已完成修复。值得注意的是，模型仍能准确回答马嘉祺的相关信息，丧失的只是「写出这个字」的能力。

The starting point of the problem was that the tokenizer merged "Jiaqi" into an independent token. The model learned it during the pre-training phase, but the post-training dialogue data contained fewer than 5 samples of "Jiaqi." This led to: 问题的起点是分词器将「嘉祺」合并为一个独立 token。模型在预训练阶段学会了它，但后训练的对话数据里包含「嘉祺」的样本不足 5 条。这导致：

    High-frequency tokens (e.g., code symbols, tool_call markers) were repeatedly practiced during post-training, continuously updating the surrounding vector space;

    The low-frequency token "Jiaqi" was almost never practiced, and its weight vector was squeezed and shifted;

    When the model outputted, it couldn't find "Jiaqi" and instead used phonetically similar alternatives like "Jiaqi" (佳琪) or "Qiqi" (琪琪).

MiniMax then performed a full scan of the complete vocabulary of about 200,000 tokens and found that about 4.9% of the tokens showed significant degradation. The degradation was particularly severe for Japanese (29.7%), far exceeding Chinese (3.9%), English (3.5%), Korean (3.3%), and Russian (3.7%). MiniMax 随后对约 20 万 token 的完整词表做了全量扫描，发现约 4.9% 的 token 存在显著退化。日语的退化尤为严重（29.7%），远超中文（3.9%）、英文（3.5%）、韩语（3.3%）和俄语（3.7%）。

This also explains another old problem: the model occasionally mixes Russian or Korean characters into Japanese conversations, the root cause being that Japanese token parameters drift and get confused with other languages in the vector space. 这也解释了另一个旧问题：模型在日语对话中偶尔混入俄语或韩语字符，根因同样是日语 token 参数漂移后在向量空间中与其他语言发生混淆。

The fix is to construct synthetic data covering the entire vocabulary and use simple repetition tasks to ensure every token is trained. After the fix, the proportion of Russian characters mixed into Japanese responses dropped from 47% to 1%, and the stability of output parameters across the entire vocabulary increased from a minimum of 0.329 to all above 0.97. 修复方案是构造覆盖全词表的合成数据，用简单的复读任务确保每个 token 都被练到。修复后，日语回答混入俄文字符的比例从 47% 降至 1%，全词表输出参数稳定度从最低 0.329 升至全部高于 0.97。

item.title: 曝甲骨文裁员 2-3 万人，员工集体争取更高遣散费遭拒
item.guid: 曝甲骨文裁员-2-3-万人，员工集体争取更高遣散费遭拒
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, on March 31, Oracle laid off approximately 20,000 to 30,000 employees via email. The laid-off employees subsequently attempted collective bargaining for higher severance packages but were rejected. 据 TechCrunch 报道，3 月 31 日，甲骨文 (Oracle) 通过电子邮件裁减约 2 万至 3 万名员工。被裁员工随后尝试集体谈判争取更高遣散待遇，遭到拒绝。

The severance package offered by Oracle is: after signing a waiver agreement, employees will receive 4 weeks of salary for the first year, with an additional 1 week for each full year thereafter, up to a maximum of 26 weeks, plus 1 month of COBRA health insurance. 甲骨文提供的遣散方案为：签署免责协议后，员工可获得第一年 4 周工资，此后每满一年增加 1 周，上限 26 周，另附 1 个月 COBRA 医疗保险。

The core of the dispute lies in the handling of stock — the company did not accelerate the vesting of upcoming RSUs (Restricted Stock Units), and all unvested stock before the termination date was forfeited. According to Time, one long-term employee lost $1 million in stock as a result, just 4 months shy of vesting, with RSUs accounting for approximately 70% of their total compensation. 争议核心在于股票处理 —— 公司未对即将归属的 RSU（限制性股票单位）予以加速，解雇日前未归属股票一律没收。据《时代》报道，一名长期员工因此损失 100 万美元股票，距归属仅差 4 个月，RSU 约占其总薪酬的 70%。

In contrast, Meta's severance package starts with 16 weeks of base salary, plus an additional 2 weeks per year, and covers 18 months of COBRA insurance; Cloudflare, on the other hand, provides salary until the end of this year and accelerates stock vesting. 相比之下，Meta 遣散方案起点为 16 周基本工资，另加每年 2 周，并覆盖 18 个月 COBRA 保险；Cloudflare 则提供薪资至今年年底并加速股票归属。

At least 90 laid-off employees signed a petition demanding Oracle match industry standards, but according to an email obtained by TechCrunch, Oracle refused to negotiate, offering only "accept" or "forfeit" as options. 至少 90 名被裁员工签署请愿书，要求甲骨文对标行业水平，但据 TechCrunch 获悉的邮件，甲骨文拒绝谈判，只给出「接受」或「放弃」两个选项。

item.title: 💡 Anthropic 联创：AI 对就业的冲击被高估了
item.guid: 💡-Anthropic-联创：AI-对就业的冲击被高估了
item.description:
According to The Stanford Daily, Daniela Amodei, co-founder and president of Anthropic, stated yesterday at the Stanford Graduate School of Business's "View From The Top" speaker series that public concerns about AI's impact on the job market are significantly exaggerated. 据《斯坦福日报》报道，Anthropic 联合创始人兼总裁 Daniela Amodei 昨日在斯坦福大学商学院「View From The Top」系列演讲活动中表示，外界对 AI 冲击就业市场的担忧存在明显夸大。

Daniela stated that, according to Anthropic's continuously tracked economic indicators, AI currently appears more as "skill complementarity" than "job replacement." She pointed out that AI is changing the nature of work rather than simply eliminating jobs themselves, with the customer service sector being one of the few industries currently showing a clear replacement effect. Daniela 表示，根据 Anthropic 持续跟踪的经济指数，AI 目前呈现出的形态更接近「技能互补」而非「岗位替代」。她指出，AI 正在改变工作的性质，而非简单消灭工作本身，客服领域是目前少数确实出现明显替代效应的行业之一。

Taking software development as an example, she predicted that the engineering profession would not disappear, but the focus of work would shift from writing code to communication and collaboration with product managers and clients, i.e., aspects that AI is not good at handling. 以软件开发为例，她预测工程师这一职业不会消失，但工作重心将从编写代码转向与产品经理、客户的沟通协作，即那些 AI 不擅长处理的环节。

Daniela also proposed the concept of "comparative advantage shift." She believes that in a future where AI can handle more routine productive tasks, human advantages will lean towards empathy, social judgment, and interpersonal communication. She illustrated this with the healthcare industry: Daniela 同时提出了「比较优势位移」的概念。她认为，在 AI 能够承担更多日常生产性工作的未来，人类的优势将向同理心、社会判断力和人际沟通倾斜。她以医疗行业为例说明：

AI might surpass doctors in diagnostic accuracy, but the warmth of "bedside care" and the clinical effects brought by patient trust are something AI cannot replicate.

item.title: 小鹏多款 SUV 新车亮相
item.description:
In the new product public announcement information for the 407th batch of "Road Motor Vehicle Manufacturers and Products Announcement" disclosed yesterday, three new XPeng SUV products officially debuted: 在昨天披露的第 407 批《道路机动车辆生产企业及产品公告》新产品公示信息中，小鹏三款新 SUV 产品正式亮相：

XPeng G9L: 小鹏 G9L：

  • Length 5120mm, wheelbase 3100mm; 长 5120mm，轴距 3100mm；
  • Pure electric offers two-wheel drive and four-wheel drive; two-wheel drive motor power 270kw; four-wheel drive motor power 160+270kw; 纯电提供两驱、四驱；两驱电机功率 270kw；四驱电机功率 160+270kw；
  • Extended-range version equipped with Dong'an 1.5T range extender (model DAM15NTE, power 110kw); two-wheel drive motor power 210kw; four-wheel drive motor power 160+210kw. 增程版搭载东安 1.5T 增程器（型号 DAM15NTE，功率 110kw）；两驱电机功率 210kw；四驱电机功率 160+210kw。

XPeng Mona L05: 小鹏 Mona L05：

  • Length 4870mm, wheelbase 2940mm; 长 4870mm，轴距 2940mm；

    • Pure electric motor power 183kw; extended-range version equipped with Chongqing Xiaokang 1.5L range extender (model H15R, power 70kw), motor power 183kw.

Xpeng Mona L03: 小鹏 Mona L03：

    New extended-range version added, length 4650, 4672mm, wheelbase 2850mm;

    Equipped with Chongqing Xiaokang 1.5L range extender (model H15R, power 70kw); motor power 183kw.

item.title: Google 旗下修图软件推出大更新
item.guid: Google-旗下修图软件推出大更新
item.description:
Recently, Google's mobile photo editing app officially launched version 4.0: the overall UI has been refreshed, and various film features have been introduced. You can experience it by updating directly in the Google Play Store/Apple App Store. 近日，Google 旗下手机修图 App 正式上线了 4.0 版本：整体 UI 焕新，还上线了各种胶片功能，直接在 Google Play 商店/苹果 App Store 更新即可体验。

    The overall UI has become more vibrant, with yellow and green as the main colors;

    Snapseed Camera launched: adapted to Android multi-camera interface, taking Xiaomi 15 as an example, it supports rear triple focal length switching;

    New "Free Film" filters added: offering various classic film colors such as Kodak Portra 400, Kodak Gold 200, Fuji Superia 200, and corresponding post-processing like noise;

    In terms of post-processing, the "Grainy Film" feature also launched free film filter adjustments, as well as new bloom adjustments.

item.title: 电脑微信三大更新来袭
item.guid: 电脑微信三大更新来袭
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat Pay announced three major updates for the PC version of WeChat: 昨天，微信派发文宣布了电脑端微信三大更新：

    Scrolling screenshot: The PC version of WeChat supports "scrolling screenshots" (update the PC version of WeChat to 4.1.9);

    Voice input: Click the small microphone in the lower right corner of the chat box or hold down the Alt key to start speaking directly. You can also adjust the shortcut keys in "WeChat - Settings";

    Continuous emoji sending: After selecting an emoji and moving it to the input box, press "→" to quickly duplicate the emoji.

item.title: 光帆带摄像头 AI 耳机 5 月 15 日开售
item.guid: 光帆带摄像头-AI-耳机-5-月-15-日开售
item.description:
Yesterday, LightSail Technology released a warm-up poster, announcing that its "LightSail Full-Sense AI Earphones" will officially go on sale on May 15th. Visual perception is the main selling point of this product, which LightSail positions as "full-sense, active, and personalized." 昨天，光帆科技发布预热海报，宣布旗下「光帆全感 AI 耳机」将于 5 月 15 日正式开售。视觉感知是该产品的主打卖点，光帆将其定位为「全感知、主动式、个性化」。

It is worth mentioning that just the day before, The Verge and other media reported that Apple is pushing for camera-equipped AirPods to be released within the year. With leading manufacturers joining, AI headphones that support visual perception are becoming a new focus in the hardware track. 值得一提的是，就在此前一天，The Verge 等媒体报道称，苹果正在推进带摄像头的 AirPods 于年内落地。随着头部厂商加入，支持视觉感知的 AI 耳机正在成为硬件赛道中新的焦点。

item.title: 百度文心 5.1 正式发布，Agent 能力超越 DeepSeek-V4-Pro
item.guid: 百度文心-5.1-正式发布，Agent-能力超越-DeepSeek-V4-Pro
item.description:
Baidu officially released the Wenxin 5.1 large model yesterday. Official information shows that Wenxin 5.1, while retaining the core knowledge of Wenxin 5.0, has compressed the total number of parameters to about one-third of Wenxin 5.0 and the number of active parameters to about one-half. It ranks fourth globally and first domestically on the Arena search list with 1223 points. 百度昨日正式发布文心 5.1 大模型。官方信息显示，文心 5.1 在保留文心 5.0 核心知识的基础上，将总参数量压缩至文心 5.0 的约三分之一、激活参数量压缩至约二分之一，在 Arena 搜索榜以 1223 分位列全球第四、国内第一。

Official benchmark test data shows that Wenxin 5.1's performance surpassed DeepSeek-V4-Pro in τ³-bench and SpreadsheetBench-Verified Agent evaluations; in the AIME26 (using tools) math competition evaluation, it scored 99.6, second only to Gemini 3.1 Pro. 官方公布的基准测试数据显示，文心 5.1 在 τ³-bench 与 SpreadsheetBench-Verified Agent 评测中性能超越 DeepSeek-V4-Pro；在数学竞赛评测 AIME26（使用工具）中得分 99.6，仅次于 Gemini 3.1 Pro。

item.title: 蚂蚁百灵大模型发布 Ring-2.6-1T
item.description:
Ant Group's Bailing large model officially released its trillion-parameter flagship inference model Ring-2.6-1T yesterday, targeting real-world complex task scenarios and supporting two inference intensities: high and xhigh. 蚂蚁百灵大模型昨日正式发布万亿参数旗舰推理模型 Ring-2.6-1T，面向真实复杂任务场景，支持 high 与 xhigh 两种推理强度。

Official information shows that this model scored 87.60 on PinchBench, higher than GPT-5.4 xHigh, Gemini-3.1-Pro high, and Claude-Opus-4.7 xhigh; ClawEval scored 63.82, ranking among the top comparable models; Tau2-Bench Telecom reached 95.32, with a gap of less than 1 point from the highest-scoring model in this project. 官方信息显示，该模式在 PinchBench 上得分 87.60，高于 GPT-5.4 xHigh、Gemini-3.1-Pro high 与 Claude-Opus-4.7 xhigh；ClawEval 得分 63.82，在可比模型中位居前列；Tau2-Bench Telecom 达到 95.32，与该项目最高分模型差距不足 1 分。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜骂虚拟偶像被判赔钱，法院：「中之人」也是真人
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜骂虚拟偶像被判赔钱，法院：「中之人」也是真人
item.description:
The Guangzhou Internet Court yesterday issued a judgment in a typical case involving defamation of a virtual idol: someone cursed a virtual idol online and was subsequently ruled to have infringed upon the reputation rights of the real-life performer. 广州互联网法院昨日发布了一起涉及虚拟偶像名誉侵权的典型案件判决：有人在网上骂了一个虚拟偶像，结果被判侵害了真人扮演者的名誉权。

The incident began with a "doxxing." Chen, the "real person" behind virtual girl group member "X-Bao," had her personal identity information illegally obtained and disclosed by netizens in October 2024. Her early Weibo comments were also exposed, sparking controversy. 事情的起因是一次「开盒」。虚拟女团成员「X宝」的「中之人」陈某，在 2024 年 10 月遭网民非法获取并公开了个人身份信息，早年间的微博言论也随之曝光，引发争议。

Chen subsequently responded in a live broadcast as "X-Bao." The day after the broadcast, a Weibo user named Li, with 500,000 followers, posted an article using a string of insulting terms to heavily attack "X-Bao," garnering over 9,500 likes. 陈某随后以「X宝」身份直播回应。直播次日，拥有 50 万粉丝的微博用户历某发文，用一串侮辱性词汇对「X宝」大加攻击，收获 9500 余次点赞。

Li argued: I was scolding a virtual idol, not a real person, and I had no idea who the "real person" was. However, the court did not accept this argument. The judgment stated that "X-Bao" has long been portrayed by Chen, and the two have formed a stable corresponding relationship, allowing the public within a specific scope to fully associate them. 历某辩称：我骂的是虚拟偶像，又不是真人，而且我根本不知道「中之人」是谁。但法院没有接受这套说法。判决认为，「X宝」长期由陈某扮演，二者已形成稳定对应关系，特定范围内的公众完全能将两者相关联。

As for the defense that "virtual idols are public figures and should be subject to public scrutiny," the court also determined that Chen's personal remarks before her debut did not involve public interest, and the terms used by Li constituted blatant personal attacks, long having crossed the boundaries of supervision. 至于「虚拟偶像是公众人物、应接受舆论监督」的抗辩，法院也认定，陈某出道前的个人言论并不涉及公共利益，历某使用的词汇已是赤裸裸的人身攻击，早就越过了监督的边界。

Ultimately, Li was ordered to post an apology statement at the top of her Weibo page and to pay 10,000 yuan in emotional distress compensation and 5,000 yuan in legal fees. 最终，历某被判在微博置顶发布道歉声明，并赔偿精神损害抚慰金 1 万元及律师费 5000 元。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《给阿嬷的情书》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《给阿嬷的情书》
item.description:
The plot of "A Love Letter to Grandma" revolves around Teochew grandma Ye Shurou. Her grandson Xiaowei, burdened by debt, secretly travels alone to Thailand to find the legendary billionaire grandfather Zheng Musheng, only to bring back news that shocks the family: 《给阿嬷的情书》剧情围绕潮汕阿嬷叶淑柔展开。孙子晓伟因债务缠身，瞒着家人只身赴泰国寻找传说中的亿万富豪阿公郑木生，却带回一个震惊家族的消息：

Grandpa had long passed away, and the person who had been exchanging letters and continuously romancing Grandma for decades was, in fact, a stranger. As Xiaowei investigates, a hidden romance spanning half a century surfaces. 阿公早已离世，数十年来与阿嬷鸿雁传书、持续谈情说爱的，竟是一位陌生人。随着晓伟的追查，一段跨越半个世纪的隐秘情感浮出水面。

The film received a score of 9.1 on Douban, with over 103,000 people participating in the evaluation. Its overall reputation ranks "better than 98% of drama films," and audience reviews generally focus on the film's authentic portrayal of Teochew regional culture and its restrained emotional expression. 影片在豆瓣获得 9.1 分，逾 10.3 万人参与评价，综合口碑位列「好于 98% 剧情片」，观众评价普遍集中于影片对潮汕地域文化的真实还原与克制的情感表达。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《语言人》以 40 年前的判断回应 AI 时代语言焦虑
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《语言人》以-40-年前的判断回应-AI-时代语言焦虑
item.description:
"Man of Language: On the Contribution of Linguistics to the Humanities" is a representative work by Claude Hagège, Professor of Theoretical Linguistics at the Collège de France. The original work, "L'Homme de paroles," was first published in 1985. 《语言人：论语言学对人文科学的贡献》是法兰西学院理论语言学讲座教授克洛德·海然热（Claude Hagège）的代表作，原著《L’Homme de paroles》首版于 1985 年。

The entire book is structured around the central theme of "the contribution of linguistics to the humanities," divided into three parts: upper, middle, and lower. Hagège's core judgment directly addresses the language anxiety of the AI era: exponentially growing industrial technology will not threaten the rich and subtle expressive ways of various languages, because human language expression is not essentially directly related to technological progress. 全书以「语言学对人文科学的贡献」为核心命题，分上、中、下三编展开。海然热的核心判断直接回应了 AI 时代的语言焦虑：成倍增长的工业技术不会威胁各语言丰富细腻的表达方式，因为人类语言表达与科技进步本质上并无直接关联。

He substantiates this with examples of multilingual expressions for "boredom": Dutch says "the millstone is around the neck," Hungarian says "trying to break free from the elbow," and Moroccan Arabic says "catching flies," intending to illustrate that the subtlety of language continues to flourish in its respective cultural soil, rather than tending towards homogenization. 他以多语言的「厌烦」表达为例加以佐证：荷兰语说「碾盘套住了脖子」，匈牙利语说「尽力挣脱胳膊肘」，摩洛哥阿拉伯语说「捕捉苍蝇」，意在说明语言的细腻性正在各自的文化土壤中持续蓬勃发展，而非趋向同质化。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《混音青春》
item.description:
"Mixtape" was officially released on May 7th, available on PC, PS5, Switch 2, and Xbox Series platforms. The game stars three friends on the verge of high school graduation, with the story beginning on the way to a party the night before graduation. 《混音青春》于 5 月 7 日正式发售，登陆 PC、PS5、Switch 2 及 Xbox Series 平台，游戏以三位即将高中毕业的好友为主角，故事始于毕业前夜前往派对的途中。

Unlike traditional narrative games that emphasize player choice, "Mixtape" does not offer branching options that affect the ending. Instead, it places players between being an observer and a participant, accompanying the characters as they relive awkward, wild, and authentic moments of youth. Each memory is packaged as a "playable music video." 与强调玩家选择的传统叙事游戏不同，《混音青春》并不提供影响结局的分支选项，而是将玩家置于旁观者与参与者之间，陪伴角色重温那些尴尬、疯狂又真实的青春片段。每段回忆均被包装为一支「可游玩的 MV」。

Music is the core pillar of this work. The game extensively licenses 90s pop and rock tracks from real artists such as DEVO, Roxy Music, Lush, and The Smashing Pumpkins, with each song highly matching the mood of its corresponding scene. 音乐是本作的核心支柱。游戏大量授权使用 DEVO、Roxy Music、Lush、The Smashing Pumpkins 等真实艺人的 90 年代流行与摇滚曲目，每首歌均与对应场景的情绪高度契合。

After its release, "Mixtape" received widespread acclaim. IGN gave it the first perfect score of 10 in 2026, calling it "almost a redefinition of coming-of-age stories in video games"; on Metacritic, the PC version received an aggregate score of 93 (14 media outlets), the Switch 2 version 89 (6 media outlets), and the PS5 version 85 (22 media outlets). 发售后，《混音青春》获得广泛好评。IGN 为其打出 2026 年首个满分 10 分，称其「几乎重新定义了电子游戏中的青春成长故事」；Metacritic 平台 PC 版综合评分 93 分（14 家媒体），Switch 2 版 89 分（6 家媒体），PS5 版 85 分（22 家媒体）。
